# {title}

Reusable trap for the menu. Works the same as  [WaitMenu](api/WaitMenu), but runs continuously.


Pascal

```pascal
procedure AutoMenu(MenuCaption, ElementCaption : String)
```

Python

```python
AutoMenu(MenuCaption, ElementCaption)
```
